# downloadDelegate

**Instance Property**

The receiver’s download delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor unowned(unsafe) var downloadDelegate: (any WebDownloadDelegate)! { get set }
```

## Discussion

Implements the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebDownload] protocol.

WebKit may create `WebDownload` objects automatically to handle downloads that start with a webpage or link.

## Getting and Setting Delegates

- **frameLoadDelegate**: The receiver’s frame load delegate.
- **policyDelegate**: The receiver’s policy delegate.
- **resourceLoadDelegate**: The receiver’s resource load delegate.
- **uiDelegate**: The receiver’s user interface delegate.
title: downloadDelegate
